zh.Nottinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾
zh.Langton Hall, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Scrope於1429年出生在英國越可爾馬斯哈姆時，他的父親Sir John Scrope42歲，母親Elizabeth Chaworth38歲。他於1453年5月13日與Elizabeth Greystoke在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年在英國越可爾享年46歲，埋葬在英國越可爾約克。

zh-hans.Langton Hall, Nottinghamshire, England: 英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Scrope于1429年出生在英国越可爾馬斯哈姆时，他的父亲Sir John Scrope42岁，母亲Elizabeth Chaworth38岁。他于1453年5月13日与Elizabeth Greystoke在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1475年在英国越可爾享年46岁，埋葬在英国越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Scrope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: of uncertain origin. Tengvik suggests derivation from the Old Scandinavian personal name Skrópi (of doubtful etymology, but compare Old Scandinavian skrópa-maðr ‘hypocrite’, containing the genitive plural form of skrópar ‘sham, hypocrisy’). It is possible, but not certain, that this personal name forms the first element of the Notts place-name Scrooby. Otherwise there is no evidence for its currency in England or, more relevantly, in Normandy. Richards Castle (in Herefs and Shrops) was apparently named after Richard Scrope, who held estates in Herefs and Worcs in 1066 and was a Norman favourite of Edward the Confessor. The Scrope family, whose name is traditionally pronounced /skru:p/, was politically important in medieval England, and acquired estates in Lincs (Barton on Humber), NR Yorks (Castle Bolton), and in ER Yorks (Flotmanby). Richard (le) Scrope of Bolton, in Wensleydale, was Lord Chancellor in the reign of Richard II. The use of le and de in the surname, suggesting either a nickname or a locative name, must be treated with caution because these were often added gratuitously to Anglo-Norman surnames as a sign of high social status.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Scrope was born in 1429, in Masham, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John Scrope, was 42 and his mother, Elizabeth Chaworth, was 38. He married Elizabeth Greystoke on 13 May 1453, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1475, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Scrope est né en 1429, à Masham, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Scrope, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Chaworth, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Greystoke le 13 mai 1453, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1475, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à York, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Scrope 1429 in Masham, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Scrope 42 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Chaworth 38. Er hat am 13. Mai 1453 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Greystoke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1475 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Scrope è nato il nel 1429 nel Masham, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Scrope, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Chaworth, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Greystoke il 13 maggio 1453, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1475, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a York, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Scropeが1429年にイギリスヨークシュアイアマシャムで生まれた時，父Sir John Scropeは42歳，母Elizabeth Chaworthは38歳であった。1453年5月13日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでElizabeth Greystokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1475年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで46歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Scrope(이)가 1429년 영국 요르크실르 마샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Scrope(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Chaworth(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1453년 5월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Elizabeth Greystoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 영국 요르크실르에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Scrope nasceu em 1429, em Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Scrope, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Chaworth, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Greystoke em 13 de maio de 1453, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1475, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Scrope родился в 1429 г. в местности машам, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Scrope было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Chaworth, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Greystoke 13 мая 1453 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1475 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Scrope nació en 1429, en Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Scrope, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Chaworth, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Greystoke el 13 de mayo de 1453, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1475, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
